title: OpenAI Is on Pace to Miss Its Own Ad Revenue Forecast by 90%. Here’s What It Means For The AI Trade
excerpt: A research firm just ran the numbers on one of OpenAI's boldest revenue promises, and the gap between what OpenAI is projecting and what independent analysts...
content_html:
Quick Read

  • OpenAI's $100B ad revenue target for 2030 is 20 times eMarketer's forecast for the whole chatbot market, threatening Oracle's $75B in AI-linked commitments.

  • ChatGPT's AI traffic share dropped from 87% to 65% as Alphabet's Gemini gains ground, making projections of chatbot ad dominance harder to justify.

  • Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

One of the load-bearing assumptions behind the AI investment story just got a hard sanity check, and the numbers do not add up.

According to research firm eMarketer, OpenAI's advertising business is on pace to miss the company's own five-year revenue forecast by roughly 90%. OpenAI has projected $2.5 billion in OpenAI ad revenue in 2026, growing to $100 billion by 2030. eMarketer's data tells a different story: standalone AI chatbots, including ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, Google AI Mode, and Amazon's Alexa for Shopping combined, will generate less than $1 billion in ad revenue this year, and just $5.41 billion across the entire market by 2030.

OpenAI's single-company 2030 target is roughly 20 times larger than eMarketer's estimate for the entire U.S. chatbot ad market. That gap calls the whole projection into question and sits at the heart of the AI bubble debate.

What OpenAI's Forecast Requires

For the number to hold, eMarketer argues, OpenAI would need to capture search advertising budgets en masse from traditional search, dominate a fully mature chatbot ad market, and outperform essentially every ad format in history simultaneously. Any one would be ambitious; requiring all three makes the forecast look less like a plan and more like a hope. OpenAI only began its advertising trial in February 2026, and was touting these projections barely two months in.

Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

Why Ads Matter

Advertising is expected to make up roughly 36% of OpenAI's total revenue by 2030, making it central to the revenue base OpenAI needs to fund multi-year compute commitments to partners like Oracle (NYSE:ORCL), NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA), and Microsoft. Oracle alone carries $75 billion in AI-linked performance obligations tied to prepaid or customer-supplied GPU arrangements, much reportedly connected to OpenAI. If the ad pillar comes in short, the foundation under those Oracle OpenAI deals looks shakier.

Market Sensitivity

Investors have shown how sensitive they are to cracks in OpenAI's story. On April 28, 2026, a report that OpenAI was missing internal user-growth and revenue targets triggered a selloff across AI-linked stocks. Oracle fell more than 4%, NVIDIA, Broadcom, AMD, and Arm Holdings all dropped, and SoftBank fell as much as 11% in Tokyo trading. This ad-revenue analysis feeds the same skepticism. Oracle shares are now down 37.12% year to date.

content_html_zh:
快速阅读

  • OpenAI 到 2030 年的 100B 美元广告收入目标是 eMarketer 对整个聊天机器人市场预测的 20 倍，威胁到 Oracle 在 AI 相关承诺中的 75B 美元。
  • 随着 Alphabet 的 Gemini 取得进展，ChatGPT 的 AI 流量份额从 87% 下降到 65%，这使得聊天机器人广告主导地位的预测更难证明其合理性。
  • 不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

人工智能投资故事背后的一个承重假设刚刚经过严格的合理性检查，但数字并没有相加。

据研究公司 eMarketer 称，OpenAI 的广告业务预计将比公司自己的五年收入预测低约 90%。 OpenAI 预计 2026 年 OpenAI 广告收入将达到 25 亿美元，到 2030 年将增至 1000 亿美元。 eMarketer 的数据讲述了一个不同的故事：独立的 AI 聊天机器人，包括 ChatGPT、Microsoft Copilot、Google AI Mode 和亚马逊的 Alexa for Shopping，今年的广告收入将不到 10 亿美元，到 2030 年整个市场的广告收入仅为 54.1 亿美元。

OpenAI 的单一公司 2030 年目标大约比 eMarketer 对整个美国聊天机器人广告市场的估计大 20 倍。 这一差距使整个预测受到质疑，也是人工智能泡沫辩论的核心。

OpenAI 的预测需要什么

eMarketer 认为，为了保持这一数字，OpenAI 需要从传统搜索中大量获取搜索广告预算，主导完全成熟的聊天机器人广告市场，并同时超越历史上几乎所有广告格式。 任何人都会有雄心壮志；要求所有这三个条件使得预测看起来不像是计划，而更像是希望。 OpenAI 于 2026 年 2 月才开始进行广告试验，不到两个月就开始宣传这些预测。

不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

为什么广告很重要

到 2030 年，广告预计将占 OpenAI 总收入的约 36%，这使其成为 OpenAI 为向 Oracle (NYSE:ORCL)、NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) 和 Microsoft 等合作伙伴的多年计算承诺提供资金所需的收入基础的核心。 仅甲骨文就承担了 750 亿美元的与 AI 相关的绩效义务，这些义务与预付费或客户提供的 GPU 安排相关，据报道大部分与 OpenAI 有关。 如果广告支柱不足，那么 Oracle OpenAI 交易的基础看起来就会更加不稳定。

市场敏感性

投资者已经表现出他们对 OpenAI 故事中的漏洞有多敏感。 2026 年 4 月 28 日，一份有关 OpenAI 未能实现内部用户增长和收入目标的报告引发了人工智能相关股票的抛售。 甲骨文跌幅超过 4%，英伟达、博通、AMD、Arm Holdings 均下跌，软银在东京交易中跌幅高达 11%。 这种广告收入分析也引发了同样的怀疑。 甲骨文股价今年迄今已下跌 37.12%。
